Accelerating Malaysia’s upstream future with Petronas & Wood Mackenzie
Watch how data, AI, and global insight are driving faster, smarter energy development

21 July 2026
1 minute read

Email
Share by email

Discover how Petronas, through Malaysia Petroleum Management (MPM), is advancing Malaysia’s upstream sector by accelerating development, strengthening investment, and embracing new technologies.
In this short video, Bacho Pilong, Senior Vice President of MPM, shares perspectives on industry progress and the role of data platforms and global insight in improving decision-making and efficiency.
With clear ambitions to sustain production and attract global partners, Malaysia is building a more agile and competitive energy ecosystem.
Watch the video to see how Petronas is shaping what comes next.
